public_publish_request: Maintainer requested public GitHub and Marketplace publication on 2026-07-12.
summary: Turns the governed first-party skill pipeline into reusable OSS maintenance infrastructure through a unified CLI, five-minute quickstart, composite GitHub Action, external consumer fixture, deterministic release gate, and executable issue-to-release workflow.
includes: our-skills and our-skills.cmd unified CLI launchers
GitHub OIDC and Sigstore supply-chain workflow
CodeQL, OpenSSF Scorecard, Dependabot, and secret-scanning configuration
